examples: He caught a glimpse of her in the crowd.
Below us you could glimpse the rooftops of a few small villages.
Some of the fans had waited 24 hours outside the hotel to catch a glimpse of their heroine.
Climbing the next ridge, I finally caught a glimpse of what I had come for.
In the workshop upstairs, you can get a behind-the-scenes glimpse of the artists' works-in-progress.
